message:
perf(notify,resilience): parallelize notifications and async event handling

Reduce latency for notification delivery and prevent blocking in the
resilience monitor's event handlers.

Notification parallelism (notify/notify.go):
- Send notifications through all enabled channels concurrently using
  goroutines instead of sequentially
- Use sync.WaitGroup to wait for all channels to complete
- Collect errors thread-safely with errMu sync.Mutex
- Reduces total notification time from sum(channel_times) to
  max(channel_times)

Async resilience handlers (resilience/monitor.go):
- handleRateLimit(): snapshot all needed values (session, paneID, etc.)
  then spawn goroutine for notifications and rotation triggers
- handleCrash(): same pattern - snapshot values then handle
  notifications asynchronously
- triggerRotationAssistance(): now takes explicit parameters instead
  of accessing agent state, enabling safe async execution
- Prevents slow notification delivery from blocking the health check
  loop

The snapshotting pattern ensures goroutines don't race with subsequent
state modifications to the AgentState struct while allowing the main
monitoring loop to continue without waiting for I/O.
